items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal eye Sporting CP defender, Ben White future uncertain
items.description: Ben White could leave Arsenal this summer, while Luka Modric is reportedly open to returning home to Croatia. Transfer Talk has the latest.

items.title: Men's Bubble Watch: The SEC is the new bids leader, Wisconsin ups its 'lock' odds
items.description: The Big Ten had an edge over the SEC in projected bid count -- but Saturday's shake-ups have led to a swap.

items.title: How Duke, Arizona, Michigan and Houston should be ranked after Saturday
items.description: We rerank the top four teams after Duke and Arizona beat Michigan and Houston, respectively.

items.title: LeBron stumps for C's Brown in MVP conversation
items.description: After Jaylen Brown fueled the Celtics' win over the Lakers on Sunday, he received an MVP endorsement from the other side of the storied rivalry.

items.title: Pacers star Haliburton diagnosed with shingles
items.description: Pacers point guard Tyrese Haliburton was diagnosed with shingles and will be away from the team for a few weeks, coach Rick Carlisle said Sunday.
